name: DeepClaw
description: Export real-time LLM cost & usage data to DeepClaw analytics

apiUrl.label: DeepClaw API URL
apiUrl.help: Base URL of your DeepClaw instance.

instanceId.label: Instance ID
instanceId.help: Identifies this OpenClaw instance in DeepClaw.

flushIntervalMs.label: Flush Interval (ms)
flushIntervalMs.help: How often to batch-send accumulated usage. Default: 5000.

debug.label: Debug Logging
debug.help: Log each LLM event to console.
